extension.summary: Strike Zone by zeus768 - Watch Fight Replays
extension.description:
Watch UFC, MMA, Boxing, Kickboxing, and more fight replays. Features include:
- Auto-scrape all categories from FullFightReplays
- Infinite scroll pagination
- Search functionality
- Local favourites
- Fight metadata and thumbnails
- Multiple video sources with ResolveURL
- Custom category images support
extension.disclaimer: This addon does not host any content. All videos are third-party links available free on the Internet.
